next_steps: Set access.nodes[0].ip on inventory/manual/systems/vaultwarden-a.json from query --live upstream_url.
Add a BIND forward A record for the vaultwarden.domain hostname pointing at the CT IP.
Configure nginx-waf sites[] with proxy_pass to the CT upstream (http://<ct-ip>:80).
Open admin_url from deploy output and authenticate with HDC_VAULTWARDEN_ADMIN_TOKEN.
Confirm signups_allowed is false unless you intend open registration.
